channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17923] volatile parent fid of OST object after mirror extend
item.description:
After extend a mirror of a file, the new OST object's parent fid points to a non-exist fid. I think the reason is:
1) A volatile MDT file is created when "lfs mirror extend" command is issued;
2) The new OST object's parent fid to the volatile fid;
3) the volatile file is removed and does not exists on MDT any more after "lfs mirror extend" command finishes.

Having a wrong parent fid in filter_fid is confusing and might causes extra work (if not problem) for lfsck. "lfs mirror extend" should make sure the new parent fid is synced to new objects.

Following are the steps to reproduce:

# FILE=mirror_file
# lfs setstripe --ost 4 $FILE
# lfs mirror extend --mirror-count --ost 0 $FILE
# lfs path2fid $FILE
[0x200000403:0x7:0x0]
# lfs getstripe $FILE
mirror_file
  lcm_layout_gen:    1
  lcm_mirror_count:  2
  lcm_entry_count:   2
    lcme_id:             65537
    lcme_mirror_id:      1
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
      lmm_stripe_count:  1
      lmm_stripe_size:   1048576
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 4
      lmm_objects:
      - 0: { l_ost_idx: 4, l_fid: [0x340000400:0x5:0x0] }

    lcme_id:             131073
    lcme_mirror_id:      2
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
      lmm_stripe_count:  1
      lmm_stripe_size:   1048576
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 0
      lmm_objects:
      - 0: { l_ost_idx: 0, l_fid: [0x240000400:0xd:0x0] }
# lfs fid2path /mnt/lustre0 0x200000403:0x8:0x0
lfs fid2path: cannot find /mnt/lustre0 0x200000403:0x8:0x0: No such file or directory

On OST:

# mount -t ldiskfs $DEV /mnt/ldiskfs
# lfs path2fid /mnt/ldiskfs/O/240000400/d13/d
[0x240000400:0xd:0x0]
# ll_decode_filter_fid /mnt/ldiskfs/O/240000400/d13/d
/mnt/ldiskfs/O/240000400/d13/d: parent=[0x200000403:0x8:0x0] stripe=0 stripe_size=1048576 stripe_count=1 component_id=1 component_start=0 component_end=18446744073709551615 layout_version=1 range=0

This problem can be produced on 2.15 branches. I think I ran this similar test on 2.12 branches before and didn't hit this (not 100% sure, need to confirm).
item.summary: volatile parent fid of OST object after mirror extend

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55388/
Subject: LU-17923 lod: update layout ver for mirror merge/split
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: c8f3930b904f627958e1c802c6a500a0b2fc1d6c

with the fix patch

# lfs getstripe -v /mnt/lustre/a
...
  - lcme_id:             131073
    lcme_mirror_id:      2
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
    lcme_offset:         184
    lcme_size:           56
    sub_layout:
      lmm_magic:         0x0BD10BD0
      lmm_seq:           0x200000402
      lmm_object_id:     0x1
      lmm_fid:           [0x200000402:0x1:0x0]
      lmm_stripe_count:  1
      lmm_stripe_size:   4194304
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 0
      lmm_objects:
      -   0: { l_ost_idx:   0, l_fid: [0x280000401:0x2:0x0] }

# mount -t ldiskfs /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey /mnt/ldiskfs

# ll_decode_filter_fid /mnt/ldiskfs/O/280000401/d2/2
/mnt/ldiskfs/O/280000401/d2/2: parent=[0x200000402:0x1:0x0] stripe=0 stripe_size=4194304 stripe_count=1 component_id=131073 component_start=0 component_end=18446744073709551615 layout_version=1 range=0

# # lfs fid2path /mnt/lustre [0x200000402:0x1:0x0]
/mnt/lustre/a

The newly added mirror component has correct parent FID, component_id and layout_version.

"Zhenyu Xu <bobijam@hotmail.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/55388
Subject: LU-17923 lod: update layout ver for mirror merge/split
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: c3a735f6fcf50df401227ffe2e4370983317ed51

master brach does have this issue

# lfs getstripe -v /mnt/lustre/a
/mnt/lustre/a
composite_header:
  lcm_magic:         0x0BD60BD0
  lcm_size:          240
  lcm_flags:         ro
  lcm_layout_gen:    1
  lcm_mirror_count:  2
  lcm_entry_count:   2
components:
  - lcme_id:             65537
    lcme_mirror_id:      1
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
    lcme_offset:         128
    lcme_size:           56
    sub_layout:
      lmm_magic:         0x0BD10BD0
      lmm_seq:           0x200000402
      lmm_object_id:     0x1
      lmm_fid:           [0x200000402:0x1:0x0]
      lmm_stripe_count:  1
      lmm_stripe_size:   4194304
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 1
      lmm_objects:
      -   0: { l_ost_idx:   1, l_fid: [0x2c0000401:0x2:0x0] }

  - lcme_id:             131073
    lcme_mirror_id:      2
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
    lcme_offset:         184
    lcme_size:           56
    sub_layout:
      lmm_magic:         0x0BD10BD0
      lmm_seq:           0x200000402
      lmm_object_id:     0x1
      lmm_fid:           [0x200000402:0x1:0x0]
      lmm_stripe_count:  1
      lmm_stripe_size:   4194304
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 0
      lmm_objects:
      -   0: { l_ost_idx:   0, l_fid: [0x280000401:0x2:0x0] }

# mount -t ldiskfs /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey /mnt/ldiskfs

# lfs path2fid /mnt/ldiskfs/O/280000401/d2/2 
[0x280000401:0x2:0x0]

# ll_decode_filter_fid /mnt/ldiskfs/O/280000401/d2/2
/mnt/ldiskfs/O/280000401/d2/2: parent=[0x200000402:0x2:0x0] stripe=0 stripe_size=4194304 stripe_count=1 component_id=1 component_start=0 component_end=18446744073709551615 layout_version=1 range=0

# lfs fid2path /mnt/lustre/ [0x200000402:0x2:0x0]
lt-lfs fid2path: cannot find /mnt/lustre/ [0x200000402:0x2:0x0]: No such file or directory

# git describe
v2_15_63-127-ga2bba4892c
